title: Celigo vs MuleSoft: Which Integration Platform Is Right for Your Business?
subtitle: A Plain-English Comparison to Help You Choose Without the Sales Pitch
description: Compare Celigo and MuleSoft to find the right integration platform for your business. Honest, plain-English breakdown of costs, complexity, use cases, and which type of business suits each platform.
author: James Plant
